job_description: Senior AI Engineer with 5-9 years of experience. Deep technical depth in modern ML systems: embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, fine-tuning. Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems like sentence-transformers, BGE, E5. Experience with vector databases such as Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, FAISS. Hands-on experience with evaluation frameworks for ranking systems: NDCG, MRR, MAP, A/B testing. Strong Python programming skills. Ability to build end-to-end ranking and recommendation systems.
